executive_summary: Structurally complete but broken at runtime. The critical onDrop logic bug in useDraggable.ts prevents reorder() from ever being called. All FRs pass except FR-8 (partially). US-001, US-002, US-003 partially comply due to the bug. Refactor: fix dragSourceRef tracking in useDraggable, fix DraggableDemo font/remeasure issues, improve CSS cursor affordance, add drag event integration tests.
minor_observations: No aria-grabbed/aria-dropeffect attributes — drag inaccessible to screen readers.
cursor: grab only on .draggable-table-grip and th — full-row drag affordance invisible.
26 tests cover reorder() pure function only — broken drag event handlers not tested.
DraggableDemo defines local LINE_HEIGHT/CELL_PADDING constants instead of importing from measure.ts.
dragOverIndex ref shared across row and column drag operations.
conclusions_and_recommendations: Fix useDraggable.ts by introducing dragSourceRef set in onDragStart; use it as 'from' in onDrop with rowIndex/colIndex as 'to'. Fix DraggableDemo to pass original rows to useMeasure. Replace inline font strings with fonts.ts constants. Add cursor: grab to tr elements. Add drag-event integration tests.

refactor_plan.title: Fix useDraggable.ts onDrop logic (critical)
refactor_plan.action: Introduce dragSourceRef = useRef<number|null>(null). Set it in onDragStart to the source rowIndex/colIndex. In onDrop, use dragSourceRef.current as 'from' and rowIndex/colIndex (drop target) as 'to'. Apply to both getRowHandleProps and getColHandleProps. Clear dragSourceRef in onDrop and onDragEnd.

refactor_plan.title: Fix DraggableDemo in App.tsx (FR-7 + FR-8)
refactor_plan.action: Pass original rows/DRAGGABLE_COLUMN_WIDTHS to useMeasure. Derive visual ordering at render time without creating new array references as dependencies. Replace inline fontFamily/fontSize with constants from fonts.ts.

refactor_plan.title: Fix CSS drag cursor affordance
refactor_plan.action: Add cursor: grab to .draggable-table tr so the full row shows a grab cursor, not only the grip span.

refactor_plan.title: Add drag event integration tests
refactor_plan.action: Add tests simulating onDragStart -> onDragEnter -> onDrop event sequences using renderHook, covering row reorder and column reorder happy paths.
